_comment: Read ONLY by design-sync's tsconfig-paths esbuild plugin (cfg.tsconfig).
DELIBERATELY CONTAINS NO WILDCARD PATTERNS. That plugin strips block comments
with a naive regex before JSON.parse, and the two-character sequence that opens
a block comment also occurs inside a normal alias like the Next default one.
The stripper eats from there to the next comment terminator, the parse throws,
the plugin silently returns null, and every shim below is ignored -- which shows
up much later as components rendering blank against the real next/navigation.
So: exact-match keys only here. The repo-root tsconfig.json still supplies the
@/ alias, which esbuild picks up on its own by walking up from each source file.
tsconfig.dts.json is not read by that plugin and can use wildcards freely.
